meta_info.description: Standardized Career Assessment for Pakistani FSc/ICS/Arts Students — DAT-style Aptitude (4 subscales matching model features), IPIP-style Big Five (balanced keying), Holland RIASEC Interest Profiler (equal items per type)

structure.aptitude_test: 20 items: 5 Math, 5 Logic, 5 Verbal, 5 Applied Problem-Solving — matches model features Aptitude_Math, Aptitude_Logic, Aptitude_Verbal, Aptitude_Spatial
structure.psychology_test: 20 items: 4 per Big Five trait, 2 positive + 2 negative keyed each
structure.interest_test: 20 items: RIASEC types with near-equal coverage, tagged to dataset career keywords

references: Torrance-style divergent thinking adapted to MCQ format for Applied Problem-Solving subscale

administration.instructions_en: There are no right or wrong answers in Sections 2 and 3. Answer honestly for the most accurate career guidance.
administration.instructions_ur: Section 2 aur 3 mein koi jawab sahih ya ghalat nahi. Durust rehnumai ke liye imandari se jawab dein.

aptitude.method: Subscale Score = (sum of weights of correctly answered questions / sum of weights of all questions in that subscale) * 100. Weights: easy = 1, medium = 2, hard = 3.
aptitude.note: Aptitude_Spatial category is displayed as 'Applied Problem-Solving' in user-facing UI labels for construct validity.

psychology.method: Likert 1-5 per item. Negative-keyed items are reverse-scored (6 - answer). Trait raw = mean of its 4 items (range 1-5). Model feature = raw * 2 (range 2-10, matches dataset scale 1-10).

interest.method: Yes = 2, Maybe = 1, No = 0 per item. For each RIASEC type: score = (points earned / max possible points for that type) * 100. Max points: R = 8 (4 items), I = 8 (4 items), A = 6 (3 items), S = 6 (3 items), E = 6 (3 items), C = 6 (3 items). Outputs 6 numeric features directly — no text generation, no TF-IDF.
interest.example: Student answers I-items: Yes, Yes, Yes, Maybe = 7 of 8 points -> Interest_I = round(7/8*100) = 88

aptitude_test.description: DAT-style aptitude: Numerical Ability, Logical/Abstract Reasoning, Verbal Reasoning, Creative Thinking. FSc difficulty level. 4 options, 1 correct.

questions.text_en: A shopkeeper buys an article for Rs. 800 and sells it at a 15% profit. What is the selling price?
questions.text_ur: Aik dukandar aik cheez Rs. 800 mein khareedta hai aur 15% munafa par bechta hai. Farokht ki qeemat kya hai?

questions.text_en: The ratio of boys to girls in a class is 3:5. If there are 40 students in total, how many are girls?
questions.text_ur: Aik class mein larkon aur larkiyon ka nisbat 3:5 hai. Agar kul 40 talib-ilm hain, to larkiyan kitni hain?

questions.text_en: A sum of Rs. 12,000 is invested at 10% simple interest per annum. What is the total amount after 3 years?
questions.text_ur: Rs. 12,000 ko 10% salana saada sood par lagaya jata hai. 3 saal baad kul raqam kya hogi?

questions.text_en: A train 150 m long passes a pole in 15 seconds. What is the speed of the train in km/h?
questions.text_ur: 150 metre lambi train aik khambe ko 15 second mein paas karti hai. Train ki raftaar km/h mein kya hai?

questions.text_en: The average of five numbers is 42. If one number is removed, the average of the remaining four becomes 40. What number was removed?
questions.text_ur: Paanch adaad ka ausat 42 hai. Agar aik adad hata diya jaye to baqi chaar ka ausat 40 ho jata hai. Konsa adad hataya gaya?

questions.text_en: Complete the series: 2, 6, 18, 54, ___
questions.text_ur: Series mukammal karein: 2, 6, 18, 54, ___

questions.text_en: Statement: All engineers are problem-solvers. Some problem-solvers are inventors. Conclusion: Some engineers are inventors.
questions.text_ur: Bayaan: Tamam engineers masla-hal karne walay hain. Kuch masla-hal karne walay muujid hain. Nateeja: Kuch engineers muujid hain.

questions.text_en: If CLOUD is coded as DMPVE, how is STORM coded?
questions.text_ur: Agar CLOUD ko DMPVE likhein, to STORM ko kaise likhein ge?

questions.text_en: If it takes 5 machines 5 minutes to make 5 widgets, how long would it take 100 machines to make 100 widgets?
questions.text_ur: Agar 5 machines ko 5 widgets banane mein 5 minute lagtay hain, to 100 machines ko 100 widgets banane mein kitna waqt lagay ga?

questions.text_en: In a certain school, all science students study Chemistry. Ali does not study Chemistry. Which conclusion MUST be true?
questions.text_ur: Aik school mein tamam science ke talib-ilm Chemistry parhte hain. Ali Chemistry nahi parhta. Konsa nateeja lazmi durust hai?

options.B: Ali is not a science student

questions.text_en: Choose the word most similar in meaning to 'Pragmatic':
questions.text_ur: 'Pragmatic' ke qareebi maani ka lafz chunein:

questions.text_en: Choose the word opposite in meaning to 'Eloquent':
questions.text_ur: 'Eloquent' ke mutazad lafz ka intikhab karein:

questions.text_en: Read: 'Despite initial setbacks, the team persevered and ultimately succeeded.' What does 'persevered' most likely mean here?
questions.text_ur: 'Despite initial setbacks, the team persevered and ultimately succeeded.' — yahan 'persevered' ka matlab kya hai?

questions.text_en: Knowledge is to Ignorance as Courage is to ___:
questions.text_ur: Ilm ka ta'aluq Jahalat se hai jaise Himmat ka ta'aluq ___ se hai:

questions.text_en: Select the correct sentence:
questions.text_ur: Durust jumla chunein:

options.A: Neither the students nor the teacher were present.
options.B: Neither the students nor the teacher was present.
options.C: Neither the students or the teacher were present.
options.D: Neither the students or teacher was present.

questions.text_en: A factory has thousands of leftover plastic bottles. Which reuse idea is the MOST original and practical?
questions.text_ur: Aik factory ke paas hazaron bachi hui plastic ki botlein hain. Konsa dobara istemaal ka khayal sab se zyada munfarid aur qabil-e-amal hai?

options.C: Build low-cost vertical garden walls for schools

questions.text_en: Which pair of words forms the most meaningful NEW connection? (Remote association)
questions.text_ur: Konsa joda sab se ba-maani NAYA ta'aluq banata hai? (Remote association)

questions.text_en: Your village school has no electricity for fans in summer. Which solution shows the most creative problem-solving?
questions.text_ur: Aap ke gaon ke school mein garmiyon mein pankhon ke liye bijli nahi. Konsa hal sab se takhleqi hai?

options.B: Ask students to bring hand fans
options.C: Design cross-ventilation with wind-catching windows facing the breeze

questions.text_en: A square, a triangle, and a circle are combined to make a symbol for a science club. Which combination best communicates 'discovery'?
questions.text_ur: Aik murabba, tikon aur daira mila kar science club ka nishan banana hai. Konsa imtizaaj 'daryaft' ko behtareen zahir karta hai?

options.B: A triangle (arrow) breaking out of a circle (boundary of known)
options.D: Three separate shapes in a row

questions.text_en: Which question is the MOST useful to ask when improving a rickshaw for Pakistani cities?
questions.text_ur: Pakistani shehron ke liye rickshaw behtar banane ke liye konsa sawal sab se zyada mufeed hai?

options.B: How can it carry more passengers safely while producing less noise and smoke?
options.D: How can it look like a car?

psychology_test.description: IPIP-style Big Five (OCEAN). 4 items per trait, balanced 2 positive + 2 negative keying to control agreement bias. Scale: 1 (Strongly Disagree) to 5 (Strongly Agree).

questions.text_en: I am quick to understand new concepts and abstract ideas.
questions.text_ur: Main naye tasawwuraat aur tajreedi khayalat ko jaldi samajh leta/leti hoon.

questions.text_en: I enjoy experimenting with new approaches rather than sticking to tried-and-tested methods.
questions.text_ur: Main puranay tariqon ki bajaye naye tariqay azmana pasand karta/karti hoon.

questions.text_en: I prefer routine work over tasks that require creative thinking.
questions.text_ur: Mujhay takhleqi soch walay kaam ki bajaye mamool ka kaam zyada pasand hai.

questions.text_en: I find abstract or theoretical discussions boring and pointless.
questions.text_ur: Mujhay tajreedi ya nazariyati guftugu boring aur bemaqsad lagti hai.

questions.text_en: I set long-term goals and work toward them systematically.
questions.text_ur: Main taweel muddat ke maqasid muqarrar karta/karti hoon aur ba-qaida un par amal karta/karti hoon.

questions.text_en: I pay close attention to accuracy and detail in my work.
questions.text_ur: Main apnay kaam mein durusti aur tafseelat par ghor se tawajjo deta/deti hoon.

questions.text_en: I sometimes neglect my responsibilities when they become difficult.
questions.text_ur: Jab zimmedarian mushkil ho jayein to main kabhi kabhi un se ghaflat barta/barti hoon.

questions.text_en: I often leave assignments until the last moment.
questions.text_ur: Main aksar assignments aakhri waqt tak chhor deta/deti hoon.

questions.text_en: I feel energized after spending time with a large group of people.
questions.text_ur: Logon ke baray group mein waqt guzarnay ke baad main purjosh mehsoos karta/karti hoon.

questions.text_en: I naturally take the lead in group discussions and team projects.
questions.text_ur: Group bahas aur team projects mein main qudrati taur par qayadat karta/karti hoon.

questions.text_en: I prefer listening and observing rather than being the center of conversation.
questions.text_ur: Main guftugu ka markaz ban'nay ki bajaye sun'na aur mushahida karna pasand karta/karti hoon.

questions.text_en: Speaking in front of the whole class makes me want to avoid the situation entirely.
questions.text_ur: Poori class ke samnay bolna mujhe is surat-e-haal se bachne par majboor karta hai.

questions.text_en: I go out of my way to help others, even when it inconveniences me.
questions.text_ur: Main dusron ki madad ke liye apni takleef bhi bardaasht karta/karti hoon.

questions.text_en: I try to understand another person's perspective before forming my own judgment.
questions.text_ur: Apni rai banane se pehlay main dusray ka nuqta-e-nazar samajhnay ki koshish karta/karti hoon.

questions.text_en: I tend to be critical of others' mistakes rather than offering encouragement.
questions.text_ur: Main dusron ki ghaltiyon par hosla afzai ki bajaye tanqeed karta/karti hoon.

questions.text_en: In group work, winning the argument matters more to me than group harmony.
questions.text_ur: Group ke kaam mein mere liye bahas jeetna group ke ittefaq se zyada ahem hai.

questions.text_en: I find it difficult to remain calm when faced with unexpected problems.
questions.text_ur: Ghair mutawaqqa masail ka saamna karnay par main pursukoon rehna mushkil paata/paati hoon.

questions.text_en: I frequently experience self-doubt about my academic abilities.
questions.text_ur: Main aksar apni taaleemi salahiyaton par shak karta/karti hoon.

questions.text_en: I maintain composure and think clearly even under academic pressure.
questions.text_ur: Taaleemi dabao mein bhi main itminaan rakhta/rakhti hoon aur saaf sochta/sochti hoon.

questions.text_en: Small setbacks rarely affect my motivation for long.
questions.text_ur: Choti nakamiyan meri lagan ko shaz-o-nadir hi lambay arsay tak mutasir karti hain.

interest_test.description: Holland RIASEC Interest Profiler. 20 activity items, near-equal per type (R:4, I:4, A:3, S:3, E:3, C:3). Answer: Yes (2) / Maybe (1) / No (0). Scores convert directly to the 6 numeric model features Interest_R/I/A/S/E/C (0-100). career_keywords tags are kept for display/explanation purposes only.

questions.text_en: Designing or building mechanical systems, circuits, or structures.
questions.text_ur: Mechanical nizaam, circuits ya tameerati dhanchay banana ya design karna.
questions.career_keywords: circuits and electrical systems, machines and engines, buildings and construction

questions.text_en: Troubleshooting technical problems with equipment or machinery.
questions.text_ur: Machines ya aalaajaat ki fanni kharabiyan dhoond kar theek karna.
questions.career_keywords: machines and engines, mechanical systems

questions.text_en: Managing crop production and modern farming techniques.
questions.text_ur: Fasal ki paidawaar aur jadeed kashthkari ke tariqon ka intizaam karna.
questions.career_keywords: crops and modern farming

questions.text_en: Serving in a disciplined defense or military role.
questions.text_ur: Nizam-o-zabt walay difai ya fauji kirdaar mein khidmat karna.
questions.career_keywords: defense and military service

questions.text_en: Writing code to automate tasks or build software applications.
questions.text_ur: Kaam ko khud-kar karnay ke liye code likhna ya software banana.
questions.career_keywords: software and coding, building mobile apps

questions.text_en: Analyzing datasets to identify trends, patterns, or anomalies.
questions.text_ur: Data ka tajziya karke rujhanaat, patterns ya ghair-mamuli cheezein dhoondna.
questions.career_keywords: data and machine learning, statistics and analysis

questions.text_en: Studying human anatomy, physiology, or the science of diseases.
questions.text_ur: Insaani jism ki saakht, af'aal ya beemariyon ki science ka mutala'a karna.
questions.career_keywords: human anatomy and clinical medicine, diseases and laboratory diagnosis

questions.text_en: Conducting experiments in a laboratory to test scientific hypotheses.
questions.text_ur: Laboratory mein tajurbaat karke science ke mafroozon ko janchna.
questions.career_keywords: medicines and pharmacy, laboratory science and research

questions.text_en: Creating visual designs, brand identities, or multimedia content.
questions.text_ur: Visual designs, brand ki pehchaan ya multimedia mawad banana.
questions.career_keywords: visual design and creativity, clothing design and fashion

questions.text_en: Writing creative content such as stories, scripts, or articles.
questions.text_ur: Takhleqi mawad likhna jaise kahaniyan, scripts ya mazameen.
questions.career_keywords: news and journalism, storytelling and media

questions.text_en: Producing or presenting content for TV, social media, or digital platforms.
questions.text_ur: TV, social media ya digital platforms ke liye mawad banana ya pesh karna.
questions.career_keywords: media production and broadcasting

questions.text_en: Providing care and treatment to patients in a clinical setting.
questions.text_ur: Mareezon ko clinic ya hospital mein ilaaj aur dekhbhaal faraham karna.
questions.career_keywords: patient care and nursing, physical therapy and rehabilitation

questions.text_en: Explaining complex concepts to others in an accessible and engaging way.
questions.text_ur: Mushkil tasawwuraat ko dusron ko aasaan aur dilchasp andaaz mein samjhana.
questions.career_keywords: teaching and education

questions.text_en: Counseling individuals through personal, academic, or emotional challenges.
questions.text_ur: Logon ki zaati, taaleemi ya jazbati mushkilat mein mashwara dena.
questions.career_keywords: human behavior and psychology

questions.text_en: Leading a team to achieve strategic objectives within a deadline.
questions.text_ur: Aik team ki qayadat karke muqarrara waqt mein hukmat-e-amali maqasid haasil karna.
questions.career_keywords: business management and leadership

questions.text_en: Negotiating deals, presenting proposals, or advocating a legal position.
questions.text_ur: Sauday karna, tajweezat pesh karna ya qanooni moaqif ki wakaalat karna.
questions.career_keywords: law and justice, courts and advocacy

questions.text_en: Identifying market opportunities and developing a business plan.
questions.text_ur: Market ke mawaqay pehchanna aur karobari mansooba banana.
questions.career_keywords: startups and entrepreneurship, marketing and branding

questions.text_en: Maintaining accurate financial records and preparing balance sheets.
questions.text_ur: Durust maali records rakhna aur balance sheets tayyar karna.
questions.career_keywords: accounting and finance

questions.text_en: Organizing administrative processes and ensuring rules are followed.
questions.text_ur: Intizami amaal ko muntazam karna aur qawaneen ki pabandi yaqeeni banana.
questions.career_keywords: public administration and civil service

questions.text_en: Managing budgets, taxes, or systematic economic planning.
questions.text_ur: Budget, tax ya munazzam ma'aashi mansooba bandi ka intizaam karna.
questions.career_keywords: economics and financial planning, banking and finance
